name: Confetti Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 small Green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Saute onion until tender.
3. Stir in potatoes, soup and milk.
4. Add cheese, green pepper, pimiento, pepper and 1/2 cup of the top with remaining crumbs.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes.
Yield: 6-8 servings.
